General.Name: Yat Sing Holdings Ltd
General.Description: World Digital Economy Asset Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of building maintenance and renovation services in Hong Kong. It also offers supply chain management services. The company was formerly known as China Supply Chain Holdings Limited and changed its name to World Digital Economy Asset Group Limited in February 2026. World Digital Economy Asset Group Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Kingston International Centre, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
